req.title: Break-glass access
req.statement: A clinician shall invoke break-glass access for an emergent patient; break-glass use shall be audited and trigger a post-event review.

doc.reasoning: Break-glass access is a critical safety valve in healthcare systems enabling emergency care while maintaining audit trails. Testing must verify: (1) successful emergency access grant with audit emission (positive), (2) rejection when emergency assertion is absent or invalid (negative), (3) boundary conditions around concurrent requests and post-review task creation (boundary). Each test is designed to be deterministic, idempotent, and traceable to ISO/IEC/IEEE 29119-4 test design principles.

tests.name: test_break_glass_positive_emergency_access_granted
actions: POST /BreakGlass with valid clinician JWT and patient_id
include justification field with non-empty string
expected: audit event created in audit log with type 'BREAK_GLASS_ACCESS'
audit event includes clinician_id, patient_id, timestamp, justification
tests.executable:
import requests, json, uuid
from datetime import datetime

def test_break_glass_positive_emergency_access_granted():
    base_url = 'http://localhost:8080'
    clinician_token = '<valid_clinician_jwt>'
    patient_id = '<existing_patient_uuid>'
    
    payload = {
        'patient_id': patient_id,
        'emergency_reason': 'acute_sepsis',
        'justification': 'Patient in critical condition, immediate access required'
    }
    headers = {
        'Authorization': f'Bearer {clinician_token}',
        'Content-Type': 'application/json'
    }
    
    resp = requests.post(f'{base_url}/BreakGlass', json=payload, headers=headers)
    assert resp.status_code == 200, f'Expected 200, got {resp.status_code}'
    
    body = resp.json()
    assert body['access_granted'] is True, 'access_granted should be True'
    assert 'audit_event_id' in body, 'audit_event_id missing'
    assert len(body['audit_event_id']) > 0, 'audit_event_id is empty'
    
    audit_id = body['audit_event_id']
    audit_resp = requests.get(f'{base_url}/audit/{audit_id}', headers=headers)
    assert audit_resp.status_code == 200
    audit_event = audit_resp.json()
    assert audit_event['event_type'] == 'BREAK_GLASS_ACCESS'
    assert audit_event['clinician_id'] is not None
    assert audit_event['patient_id'] == patient_id

tests.name: test_break_glass_negative_missing_emergency_assertion
trace: R-HLT-021: error pathway - missing emergency assertion
tests.executable:
import requests

def test_break_glass_negative_missing_emergency_assertion():
    base_url = 'http://localhost:8080'
    clinician_token = '<valid_clinician_jwt>'
    patient_id = '<existing_patient_uuid>'
    
    payload = {
        'patient_id': patient_id,
        'justification': 'Some reason'
    }
    headers = {
        'Authorization': f'Bearer {clinician_token}',
        'Content-Type': 'application/json'
    }
    
    resp = requests.post(f'{base_url}/BreakGlass', json=payload, headers=headers)
    assert resp.status_code == 400, f'Expected 400, got {resp.status_code}'
    
    body = resp.json()
    assert 'error' in body
    assert body['error'] == 'emergency_reason_required'
    assert body.get('access_granted', False) is False
    assert 'audit_event_id' not in body

tests.name: test_break_glass_negative_invalid_clinician_role
preconditions: user has non-clinician role (e.g., admin, patient)
tests.executable:
import requests

def test_break_glass_negative_invalid_clinician_role():
    base_url = 'http://localhost:8080'
    non_clinician_token = '<valid_admin_jwt>'
    patient_id = '<existing_patient_uuid>'
    
    payload = {
        'patient_id': patient_id,
        'emergency_reason': 'acute_condition',
        'justification': 'Emergency access needed'
    }
    headers = {
        'Authorization': f'Bearer {non_clinician_token}',
        'Content-Type': 'application/json'
    }
    
    resp = requests.post(f'{base_url}/BreakGlass', json=payload, headers=headers)
    assert resp.status_code == 403
    body = resp.json()
    assert body['error'] == 'insufficient_role'
    assert body.get('access_granted', False) is False

tests.name: test_break_glass_boundary_empty_justification
trace: R-HLT-021: boundary - empty justification violates audit requirement
tests.executable:
import requests

def test_break_glass_boundary_empty_justification():
    base_url = 'http://localhost:8080'
    clinician_token = '<valid_clinician_jwt>'
    patient_id = '<existing_patient_uuid>'
    
    payload = {
        'patient_id': patient_id,
        'emergency_reason': 'acute_sepsis',
        'justification': ''
    }
    headers = {
        'Authorization': f'Bearer {clinician_token}',
        'Content-Type': 'application/json'
    }
    
    resp = requests.post(f'{base_url}/BreakGlass', json=payload, headers=headers)
    assert resp.status_code == 400
    body = resp.json()
    assert body['error'] == 'justification_too_short'
    assert body.get('access_granted', False) is False

tests.name: test_break_glass_boundary_max_justification_length
actions: POST /BreakGlass with justification at max boundary (2000 chars)
trace: R-HLT-021: boundary - maximum justification length accepted
tests.executable:
import requests

def test_break_glass_boundary_max_justification_length():
    base_url = 'http://localhost:8080'
    clinician_token = '<valid_clinician_jwt>'
    patient_id = '<existing_patient_uuid>'
    max_justification = 'A' * 2000
    
    payload = {
        'patient_id': patient_id,
        'emergency_reason': 'acute_sepsis',
        'justification': max_justification
    }
    headers = {
        'Authorization': f'Bearer {clinician_token}',
        'Content-Type': 'application/json'
    }
    
    resp = requests.post(f'{base_url}/BreakGlass', json=payload, headers=headers)
    assert resp.status_code == 200
    body = resp.json()
    assert body['access_granted'] is True
    assert 'audit_event_id' in body

tests.name: test_break_glass_boundary_post_event_review_task_creation
actions: poll review task endpoint within 5 seconds
expected: review task is created with status 'pending'
review task assigned to compliance_reviewer role
trace: R-HLT-021: error pathway - review task created post-event
tests.executable:
import requests, time

def test_break_glass_boundary_post_event_review_task_creation():
    base_url = 'http://localhost:8080'
    clinician_token = '<valid_clinician_jwt>'
    reviewer_token = '<valid_reviewer_jwt>'
    patient_id = '<existing_patient_uuid>'
    
    payload = {
        'patient_id': patient_id,
        'emergency_reason': 'acute_sepsis',
        'justification': 'Critical patient condition'
    }
    headers = {'Authorization': f'Bearer {clinician_token}',
               'Content-Type': 'application/json'}
    
    resp = requests.post(f'{base_url}/BreakGlass', json=payload, headers=headers)
    assert resp.status_code == 200
    audit_id = resp.json()['audit_event_id']
    
    time.sleep(1)
    task_headers = {'Authorization': f'Bearer {reviewer_token}'}
    task_resp = requests.get(f'{base_url}/review-tasks?audit_id={audit_id}',
                             headers=task_headers)
    assert task_resp.status_code == 200
    tasks = task_resp.json()['tasks']
    assert len(tasks) > 0
    task = tasks[0]
    assert task['status'] == 'pending'
    assert task['audit_event_id'] == audit_id
    assert task['assigned_role'] == 'compliance_reviewer'

tests.name: test_break_glass_negative_nonexistent_patient
preconditions: patient does not exist in system
trace: R-HLT-021: precondition violated - patient does not exist
tests.executable:
import requests, uuid

def test_break_glass_negative_nonexistent_patient():
    base_url = 'http://localhost:8080'
    clinician_token = '<valid_clinician_jwt>'
    nonexistent_patient_id = str(uuid.uuid4())
    
    payload = {
        'patient_id': nonexistent_patient_id,
        'emergency_reason': 'acute_sepsis',
        'justification': 'Emergency access needed'
    }
    headers = {'Authorization': f'Bearer {clinician_token}',
               'Content-Type': 'application/json'}
    
    resp = requests.post(f'{base_url}/BreakGlass', json=payload, headers=headers)
    assert resp.status_code == 404
    body = resp.json()
    assert body['error'] == 'patient_not_found'
    assert body.get('access_granted', False) is False
